account.title: Account Settings
account.description: Manage your account, data, and preferences

billing.title: Billing & Subscription
billing.manage_subscription_description: Update payment method, view invoices, and manage your subscription
billing.cancel_confirm_description: Your subscription will remain active until the end of the billing period. You'll still have access to your credits.

security.title: Security
security.description: Manage end-to-end encryption and device trust settings
security.encryption_disabled_description: Enable end-to-end encryption to secure your data. A certificate will be generated and you'll need to store it securely.
security.encryption_enabled_description: Your data is protected with end-to-end encryption. Keep your certificate safe.
security.key_loaded: Encryption key is loaded on this device
security.key_loaded_description: You can access encrypted data from this device.
security.key_required_description: Please upload your certificate to access encrypted data on this device.
security.device_trusted_description: This device is trusted. Your encryption key will remain stored even after logout.
security.device_not_trusted_description: This device is not trusted. Your encryption key will be removed when you logout.
security.step_1_description: A certificate containing a public and private key pair is generated in your browser. The public key is stored on our servers, while the private key stays with you.
security.step_2_description: The private key is encrypted and stored in your browser's secure storage. You can download the certificate as a backup.
security.step_3_description: Choose whether to keep the encryption key on this device after logout. Untrusted devices will require you to upload your certificate again.
security.tip_description: Send your certificate to yourself by email or store it in a secure location. You'll need it to access your encrypted data from new devices.

noCertificate.description: This transcription is encrypted. You need to import your encryption certificate to access it.

steps.title: What you need to do:
steps.step1: Locate your encryption certificate file (downloaded when you enabled encryption)
steps.step2: Click the button below to import it
steps.step3: Your encrypted transcriptions will then be accessible

certificateMismatch.description: This transcription was encrypted with a different certificate. The certificate loaded on this device cannot decrypt it.

reasons.title: Possible reasons:
reasons.reason1: This transcription was created by a different user
reasons.reason2: You've reset your encryption and this is an old transcription
reasons.reason3: You're using a different encryption certificate

certificateMismatch.note: If you have the original certificate that was used to encrypt this transcription, you can try importing it.

activeStatus.title: Encryption Active
activeStatus.description: Your transcriptions are protected with end-to-end encryption.

deviceTrust.title: Device Trust
deviceTrust.description: When you trust a device, your encryption certificate stays stored in your browser even after logging out. Only trust your personal devices.
deviceTrust.label: Trust this device

dangerZone.title: Danger Zone
dangerZone.description: Disabling encryption will remove all encryption keys and you will lose access to previously encrypted data.

disableDialog.title: Disable End-to-End Encryption?
disableDialog.description: This action will remove all encryption keys and settings.

warning.title: Warning: This action is irreversible
warning.point1: All your encryption keys will be permanently deleted
warning.point2: You will lose access to all previously encrypted transcriptions

disableDialog.confirmation: Are you absolutely sure you want to disable encryption?

removeKeyDialog.title: Remove Encryption Key from This Device?
removeKeyDialog.description: Your encryption certificate will be removed from this browser.

warning.title: Before you continue:
warning.point1: Make sure you have your encryption certificate saved elsewhere
warning.point2: You'll need to re-import your certificate to access encrypted transcriptions on this device
warning.point3: This only affects this device - your encryption settings remain active

compact.description: Upload your certificate to access encrypted data on this device.

full.title: Import Encryption Certificate
full.subtitle: Access Your Encrypted Transcriptions
full.description: To access your encrypted transcriptions, please import your encryption certificate. This is the file you downloaded when you first enabled encryption.

howToFind.title: How to find your certificate:
howToFind.point1: Look in your Downloads folder for a file named like encryption-certificate-*.json
howToFind.point2: Check your secure backup location where you saved it
howToFind.point3: If you use multiple devices, you may have it on another computer

lostCertificate.title: Lost your certificate?
lostCertificate.description: If you've lost your encryption certificate, you won't be able to access previously encrypted data. You can disable and re-enable encryption to start fresh, but old data will be inaccessible.

trustDialog.title: Do you trust this computer?
trustDialog.description: Should we keep your encryption certificate stored on this device?

trusted.title: Trusted Device
trusted.description: Your certificate will remain stored after logout. Only use this on your personal devices.

untrusted.title: Untrusted Device
untrusted.description: Your certificate will be removed when you logout. Use this on shared or public computers.

import.error: Failed to load certificate. Please check the file and try again.

setup.title: Protect Your Privacy
setup.subtitle: Choose how to secure your transcriptions

enabled.title: End-to-End Encryption
enabled.description: Your data is encrypted on your device before being sent to our servers. Only you can decrypt your data — not even we can read your transcriptions.

generate.intro: We'll generate a unique encryption certificate for you. You'll need this certificate to:
generate.point2: Use the app on other devices
generate.point3: Recover your data if you lose access to this device

downloaded.instruction: Your encryption certificate has been saved to your downloads folder. Keep it safe!

checklist.title: Before you continue, please confirm:
checklist.saved: I have saved my certificate in a secure location (password manager, encrypted cloud storage, etc.)
checklist.emailed: I understand I should back up my certificate (email it to myself, store it on another device, etc.)
checklist.understood: I understand that if I lose my certificate, I will permanently lose access to my encrypted transcriptions

skip.title: Skip Encryption
skip.description: You can set up encryption later in your account settings. Your data will be stored on our servers without end-to-end encryption.

trustDialog.title: Do you trust this computer?
trustDialog.description: If you trust this computer, we'll store your encryption certificate securely in your browser. You won't need to upload it again when you log in (but this is not a reason not to keep a backup!).

trusted.title: Trusted Device
trusted.description: Your certificate will remain stored after logout. Only use this on your personal devices.

untrusted.title: Untrusted Device
untrusted.description: Your certificate will be removed when you logout. Use this on shared or public computers.

errors.generate: Failed to generate certificate. Please try again.
errors.enable: Failed to enable encryption. Please try again.

success.generate: Certificate generated and downloaded! Please save it securely.
